parties.name: TESFU, YONAS BERHANE 636 GROVE STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94101

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yonas Berhane Tesfu in Propria Persona.

The Court asked Mr. Tesfu why he needs this to be established and stated that his legal document from Eritrea seems to be in order. Mr. Tesfu stated that what he has is not sufficient, that it will not allow his wife to get here, that they want to be officially noticed as being married, that their marriage is not allowed in Eritrea due to political issues and that they want certification for the U.S. so that he can bring her over. The Court stated that the attached record says that the contract serves as a legal document. Mr. Tesfu stated that this would be more official. The Court took the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
